HOME.TITLE: Welcome to SparkPlan
HOME.SUBTITLE: Transform your ideas into actionable plans with AI and automation.

HERO.TITLE: Your Business Idea, Transformed into a Professional Plan
HERO.SUBTITLE: Generate complete business plans with strategic analysis and branding in seconds. Download as PDF or save to Google Drive.

HOW_IT_WORKS.HEADING: How It Works
HOW_IT_WORKS.SUBHEADING: Create your professional business plan in 4 simple steps
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_1_DESC: Secure authentication with your Google account. No additional passwords.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_2_DESC: Write your idea in any language. Minimum 50 characters, AI does the rest.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_3_DESC: Strategic analysis, detailed business plan, and branding recommendations in seconds.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_4_DESC: Download your plan as PDF or save it directly to Google Drive.

FEATURES.HEADING: Why SparkPlan?
FEATURES.SUBHEADING: Everything you need to create professional business plans
FEATURES.FEATURE_1_DESC: Generate strategic analysis, complete plan, and branding in seconds. Not hours.
FEATURES.FEATURE_2_DESC: Write in any language — AI detects and adapts the entire plan automatically.
FEATURES.FEATURE_3_DESC: Download your plans as PDF or save them directly to Google Drive with one click.

PRICING.HEADING: Choose Your Plan
PRICING.SUBHEADING: Start free and upgrade when you need it

CTA.HEADING: Ready to Transform Your Idea?
CTA.TEXT: Create your first professional business plan for free. No credit card, no commitments.

WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Ready to turn your next idea into reality?

IDEA_FORM.TITLE: Share Your Idea
IDEA_FORM.LABEL: Describe your idea
IDEA_FORM.PLACEHOLDER: Example: I want to build a SaaS platform called ClientFlow to help freelancers and small agencies manage projects, invoices, and client communication from a single place. My target audience is independent designers and developers who currently juggle multiple disconnected tools and lose time switching between them. The business model would be a monthly subscription with a limited free plan.
IDEA_FORM.MIN_LENGTH_ERROR: Please write at least 50 characters to help us better understand your idea.
IDEA_FORM.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your plan has been successfully generated!
IDEA_FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Something went wrong. Please try again.
IDEA_FORM.INVALID_IDEA_ERROR: We couldn't analyze your idea. Make sure it describes a clear business proposal and try again.
IDEA_FORM.DRIVE_PERMISSION_DENIED: You don't have permission to access Google Drive. Please try again.
IDEA_FORM.DRIVE_REAUTH_TOAST: Google Drive permissions required. Redirecting for authorization...
IDEA_FORM.DRIVE_UPLOAD_FAILED: The file could not be saved to Google Drive. Please try again.
IDEA_FORM.TIP_1: Write in your preferred language — the complete plan will be generated in that language
IDEA_FORM.TIP_2: Include your project name to get personalized brand analysis
IDEA_FORM.TIP_3: Describe the problem you solve and who your ideal target audience is
IDEA_FORM.TIP_4: Minimum 50 characters — be specific about your unique value proposition

PLAN_HISTORY.EMPTY: You don't have any saved plans yet.
PLAN_HISTORY.NO_RESULTS: No plans found with that name.
PLAN_HISTORY.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: This action cannot be undone. The plan will be permanently deleted.

PLANS.META_DESCRIPTION: Choose the perfect plan for your needs

PLANS.SUBTITLE: Select the plan that best fits your needs

DONATION.TITLE: Buy us a coffee
DONATION.DESCRIPTION: If SparkPlan has been useful to you, consider making a small donation. Your support helps us maintain and improve the app for everyone.

COOKIES_PAGE.TITLE: Cookie Policy
COOKIES_PAGE.INTRO: This policy explains what cookies are, which ones we use at SparkPlan, and how you can manage them.
COOKIES_PAGE.WHAT_ARE_COOKIES_TEXT: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device when you visit them. They are used to remember your preferences, keep your session active, and ensure the service works correctly.
COOKIES_PAGE.COOKIES_WE_USE_INTRO: SparkPlan only uses strictly necessary cookies for the service to function. We do not use tracking, advertising, or analytics cookies.
COOKIES_PAGE.COOKIE_SESSION_PURPOSE: Keeps your user session active after signing in with Google.
COOKIES_PAGE.COOKIE_CONSENT_PURPOSE: Remembers that you have accepted this cookie policy so the notice is not shown again.
COOKIES_PAGE.COOKIE_LANG_PURPOSE: Saves your language preference (Spanish or English).
COOKIES_PAGE.COOKIE_THEME_PURPOSE: Saves your visual theme preference (light or dark).
COOKIES_PAGE.THIRD_PARTY_INTRO: Some external services we use may set their own cookies while using SparkPlan:
COOKIES_PAGE.THIRD_PARTY_GOOGLE_DESC: During the Google sign-in process, Google may set its own authentication cookies. Please refer to Google's privacy policy for more information.
COOKIES_PAGE.THIRD_PARTY_STRIPE_DESC: During the payment process, Stripe may set technical cookies necessary to process the transaction securely. Please refer to Stripe's cookie policy for more information.
COOKIES_PAGE.MANAGE_TEXT: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies. Please note that disabling necessary cookies may prevent SparkPlan from functioning correctly, particularly the sign-in process.
COOKIES_PAGE.MANAGE_BROWSERS: Instructions for the most common browsers:
COOKIES_PAGE.CONTACT_TEXT: If you have questions about this cookie policy, you can contact us at:

COOKIE_BANNER.MESSAGE: We use necessary cookies for authentication and user preferences. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.TITLE: Limit reached
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.MESSAGE_FREE: You've already used your free plan. FREE users can only create 1 plan.
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.MESSAGE_MONTHLY: You've reached your limit of {limit} plans this month ({currentUsage}/{limit}).
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.UPGRADE_CTA_FREE: Upgrade to PLUS for 30 monthly plans
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.UPGRADE_CTA_PLUS: Upgrade to PRO for 100 monthly plans
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.GLOBAL_MESSAGE: The limit of plans generated for free users this month has been exceeded.
USAGE_LIMIT_REACHED.GLOBAL_RESET_INFO: The limit will reset on {date}. Upgrade to PLUS to continue generating plans.
